members.name: Clear
members.summary: Clear all cells.

members.name: ClearBakedMeshes
members.summary: Clears all baked meshes. See [method make_baked_meshes].

members.name: GetBakeMeshInstance
members.summary: Returns [RID] of a baked mesh with the given [param idx].

members.name: GetBakeMeshes
members.summary: Returns an array of [ArrayMesh]es and [Transform3D] references of all bake meshes that exist within the current GridMap. Even indices contain [ArrayMesh]es, while odd indices contain [Transform3D]s that are always equal to [constant Transform3D.IDENTITY]. This method relies on the output of [method make_baked_meshes], which will be called with [code]gen_lightmap_uv[/code] set to [code]true[/code] and [code]lightmap_uv_texel_size[/code] set to [code]0.1[/code] if it hasn't been called yet.

members.name: GetBasisWithOrthogonalIndex
members.summary: Returns one of 24 possible rotations that lie along the vectors (x,y,z) with each component being either -1, 0, or 1. For further details, refer to the Godot source code.

members.name: GetCellItem
members.summary: The [MeshLibrary] item index located at the given grid coordinates. If the cell is empty, [constant INVALID_CELL_ITEM] will be returned.

members.name: GetCellItemBasis
members.summary: Returns the basis that gives the specified cell its orientation.

members.name: GetCellItemOrientation
members.summary: The orientation of the cell at the given grid coordinates. [code]-1[/code] is returned if the cell is empty.

members.name: GetCollisionLayerValue
members.summary: Returns whether or not the specified layer of the [member collision_layer] is enabled, given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.name: GetCollisionMaskValue
members.summary: Returns whether or not the specified layer of the [member collision_mask] is enabled, given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.name: GetMeshes
members.summary: Returns an array of [Transform3D] and [Mesh] references corresponding to the non-empty cells in the grid. The transforms are specified in local space. Even indices contain [Transform3D]s, while odd indices contain [Mesh]es related to the [Transform3D] in the index preceding it.

members.name: GetNavigationMap
members.summary: Returns the [RID] of the navigation map this GridMap node uses for its cell baked navigation meshes. This function returns always the map set on the GridMap node and not the map on the NavigationServer. If the map is changed directly with the NavigationServer API the GridMap node will not be aware of the map change.

members.name: GetOctantCoordsFromCellCoords
members.summary: Returns the [Vector3i] octant coordinates of the octant that the cell at [param cell_coords] belongs to.

members.name: GetOctantsInBounds
members.summary: Returns an array of [Vector3i] octant coordinates that are inside the given [param bounds], including octants that have no cells in use.

members.name: GetOrthogonalIndexFromBasis
members.summary: This function considers a discretization of rotations into 24 points on unit sphere, lying along the vectors (x,y,z) with each component being either -1, 0, or 1, and returns the index (in the range from 0 to 23) of the point best representing the orientation of the object. For further details, refer to the Godot source code.

members.name: GetUsedCells
members.summary: Returns an array of [Vector3] with the non-empty cell coordinates in the grid map.

members.name: GetUsedCellsByItem
members.summary: Returns an array of all cells with the given item index specified in [param item].

members.name: GetUsedCellsInOctant
members.summary: Returns an array of [Vector3i]s with the cell coordinates of non-empty cells inside the octant at [param octant_coords].

members.name: GetUsedCellsInOctantByItem
members.signature: public Vector3i[] GetUsedCellsInOctantByItem(Vector3i octantCoords, int item)
members.summary: Returns an array of [Vector3i]s with the cell coordinates of cells inside the octant at [param octant_coords] that use the specified cell [param item].

members.name: GetUsedOctants
members.summary: Returns an array of [Vector3i]s with the octant coordinates of the non-empty octants in the grid map.

members.name: GetUsedOctantsByItem
members.summary: Returns an array of [Vector3i]s with the octant coordinates of the octants that use the specified [param item] in the grid map.

members.name: GetUsedOctantsInBounds
members.summary: Returns an array of [Vector3i]s with the octant coordinates of non-empty octants that are inside the local [param bounds].

members.name: LocalToMap
members.summary: Returns the map coordinates of the cell containing the given [param local_position]. If [param local_position] is in global coordinates, consider using [method Node3D.to_local] before passing it to this method. See also [method map_to_local].

members.name: MakeBakedMeshes
members.signature: public void MakeBakedMeshes(bool genLightmapUv, float lightmapUvTexelSize)
members.summary: Generates a baked mesh that represents all meshes in the assigned [MeshLibrary] for use with [LightmapGI]. If [param gen_lightmap_uv] is [code]true[/code], UV2 data will be generated for each mesh currently used in the [GridMap]. Otherwise, only meshes that already have UV2 data present will be able to use baked lightmaps. When generating UV2, [param lightmap_uv_texel_size] controls the texel density for lightmaps, with lower values resulting in more detailed lightmaps. [param lightmap_uv_texel_size] is ignored if [param gen_lightmap_uv] is [code]false[/code]. See also [method get_bake_meshes], which relies on the output of this method. [b]Note:[/b] Calling this method will not actually bake lightmaps, as lightmap baking is performed using the [LightmapGI] node.

members.name: MapToLocal
members.summary: Returns the position of a grid cell in the GridMap's local coordinate space. To convert the returned value into global coordinates, use [method Node3D.to_global]. See also [method local_to_map].

members.name: ResourceChanged
members.summary: This method does nothing.

members.name: SetCellItem
members.signature: public void SetCellItem(Vector3i position, int item, int orientation)
members.summary: Sets the mesh index for the cell referenced by its grid coordinates. A negative item index such as [constant INVALID_CELL_ITEM] will clear the cell. Optionally, the item's orientation can be passed. For valid orientation values, see [method get_orthogonal_index_from_basis].

members.name: SetCollisionLayerValue
members.signature: public void SetCollisionLayerValue(int layerNumber, bool value)
members.summary: Based on [param value], enables or disables the specified layer in the [member collision_layer], given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.name: SetCollisionMaskValue
members.signature: public void SetCollisionMaskValue(int layerNumber, bool value)
members.summary: Based on [param value], enables or disables the specified layer in the [member collision_mask], given a [param layer_number] between 1 and 32.

members.name: SetNavigationMap
members.summary: Sets the [RID] of the navigation map this GridMap node should use for its cell baked navigation meshes.

members.name: BakeNavigation
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], this GridMap creates a navigation region for each cell that uses a [member mesh_library] item with a navigation mesh. The created navigation region will use the navigation layers bitmask assigned to the [MeshLibrary]'s item.

members.name: CellCenterX
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], grid items are centered on the X axis.

members.name: CellCenterY
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], grid items are centered on the Y axis.

members.name: CellCenterZ
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], grid items are centered on the Z axis.

members.name: CellOctantSize
members.summary: The size of each octant measured in number of cells. This applies to all three axis.

members.name: CellScale
members.summary: The scale of the cell items. This does not affect the size of the grid cells themselves, only the items in them. This can be used to make cell items overlap their neighbors.

members.name: CellSize
members.summary: The dimensions of the grid's cells. This does not affect the size of the meshes. See [member cell_scale].

members.name: CollisionLayer
members.summary: The physics layers this GridMap is in. GridMaps act as static bodies, meaning they aren't affected by gravity or other forces. They only affect other physics bodies that collide with them.

members.name: CollisionMask
members.summary: The physics layers this GridMap detects collisions in. See [url=$DOCS_URL/tutorials/physics/physics_introduction.html#collision-layers-and-masks]Collision layers and masks[/url] in the documentation for more information.

members.name: CollisionPriority
members.summary: The priority used to solve colliding when occurring penetration. The higher the priority is, the lower the penetration into the object will be. This can for example be used to prevent the player from breaking through the boundaries of a level.

members.name: CollisionVisibilityMode
members.summary: Show or hide the [GridMap]'s collision shapes. If set to [constant DEBUG_VISIBILITY_MODE_DEFAULT], this depends on the show collision debug settings.

members.name: MeshLibrary
members.summary: The assigned [MeshLibrary].

members.name: PhysicsMaterial
members.summary: Overrides the default friction and bounce physics properties for the whole [GridMap].

signals.name: Changed
signals.summary: Emitted when the [MeshLibrary] of this GridMap changes.

values.name: DEBUG_VISIBILITY_MODE_DEFAULT
values.summary: Hide the collisions debug shapes in the editor, and use the debug settings to determine their visibility in game (i.e. [member SceneTree.debug_collisions_hint] or [member SceneTree.debug_navigation_hint]).

values.name: DEBUG_VISIBILITY_MODE_FORCE_HIDE
values.summary: Always hide the collisions debug shapes.

values.name: DEBUG_VISIBILITY_MODE_FORCE_SHOW
values.summary: Always show the collisions debug shapes.

constants.name: INVALID_CELL_ITEM
constants.summary: Invalid cell item that can be used in [method set_cell_item] to clear cells (or represent an empty cell in [method get_cell_item]).

constants.name: DEBUG_VISIBILITY_MODE_DEFAULT
constants.summary: Hide the collisions debug shapes in the editor, and use the debug settings to determine their visibility in game (i.e. [member SceneTree.debug_collisions_hint] or [member SceneTree.debug_navigation_hint]).

constants.name: DEBUG_VISIBILITY_MODE_FORCE_SHOW
constants.summary: Always show the collisions debug shapes.

constants.name: DEBUG_VISIBILITY_MODE_FORCE_HIDE
constants.summary: Always hide the collisions debug shapes.
